issues.sample: CVT TRANSMISSION GAVE OUT AT 64K MILES POWER TRAIN WARRANTY ONLY GOOD THRU 5/YEAR 69K MILES DEALER REFUSING TO FIX/PAY FOR REPAIR EVEN THOUGH THERE ARE SEVERAL INSTANCES WHEEE THEY HAVE EXTENDED THE WARRANTY TO 10/YEAR 139K MILES ENGINE LIGHT STARTED TO FLICKER AT ABOUT 57K MILES

THE FOLLOWING HAS HAPPENED 5 TIMES.  EVERYTHING ON THE VEHICLE POWERS OFF, WITHOUT WARNING ~ STEERING, LIGHT,S BRAKES, ETC.  THE VEHICLE SLOWLY STOPS AND NOTHING CAN BE DONE.  (IMMEDIATELY PRIOR, THE FUEL GAUGE SHOWS 1/4 A TANK AND THE TRIP COMPUTER SHOWS 60 MILES LEFT ON THE CUR

ELECTRONIC SIDE DOORS DO NOT ADEQUATELY STOP AND RETREAT WHEN A PERSON IS PRESENT IN THE OPENING.  DOORS CONTINUE TO EXERT ENOUGH FORCE TO MOVE A FULL GROWN MAN ONE TO TWO STEPS SIDEWAYS.  WOULD LIKELY CAUSE SIGNIFICANT INJURY TO A YOUNG CHILD.  *TR

narrative.headline: What 2014 Nissan Quest owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 18 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (39% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
